summary:
KEY FUNCTIONALITY:

The Cluster class provides a way to access information about the map/reduce cluster.

CORE LOGIC:

The Cluster class initializes the clientProtocolProvider and client based on the configuration and jobTrackAddr. It also provides methods to get the file system, job, cluster status, task trackers, staging area directory, job history file path, queue ACLs, root queues, child queues, job tracker status, and task tracker expiry interval.

INPUTS/OUTPUTS:

The Cluster class takes a Configuration object as input and provides methods to get the file system, job, cluster status, task trackers, staging area directory, job history file path, queue ACLs, root queues, child queues, job tracker status, and task tracker expiry interval as output.

DEPENDENCIES:

The Cluster class depends on the ClientProtocolProvider, ClientProtocol, UserGroupInformation, Configuration, FileSystem, Path, JobConf, JobID, TaskAttemptID, ClusterMetrics, TaskTrackerInfo, QueueInfo, QueueAclsInfo, JobStatus, and Token classes.

KEY FUNCTIONALITY:
- The main purpose of this class is to manage and execute MapReduce jobs.
- It provides methods for setting up and monitoring the job, as well as for controlling its execution.

CORE LOGIC:
- The core logic of this class is to handle the submission, execution, and monitoring of MapReduce jobs.
- It includes methods for setting up the job, such as setting the input format, output format, mapper, reducer, and partitioner.
- It also includes methods for monitoring the job, such as checking its status, progress, and task completion events.

INPUTS/OUTPUTS:
- The inputs to this class include the configuration, file system, and other job-related information.
- The outputs include the updated configuration, job status, progress updates, and task completion events.

DEPENDENCIES:
- The dependencies of this class include the Cluster class, the JobSubmitter class, and other classes related to MapReduce execution.

File: Job.java

KEY FUNCTIONALITY:
- setupProgress(): returns the progress of the job's setup-tasks.
- isComplete(): checks if the job is finished or not.
- isSuccessful(): checks if the job completed successfully.
- killJob(): kills the running job.
- setPriority(): sets the priority of a running job.
- setPriorityAsInteger(): sets the priority of a running job.
- getTaskCompletionEvents(): gets events indicating completion (success/failure) of component tasks.
- killTask(): kills indicated task attempt.
- failTask(): fails indicated task attempt.
- getCounters(): gets the counters for this job.
- getTaskDiagnostics(): gets the diagnostic messages for a given task attempt.
- setNumReduceTasks(): sets the number of reduce tasks for the job.
- setWorkingDirectory(): sets the current working directory for the default file system.
- setInputFormatClass(): sets the InputFormat for the job.
- setOutputFormatClass(): sets the OutputFormat for the job.
- setMapperClass(): sets the Mapper for the job.
- setJarByClass(): sets the Jar by finding where a given class came from.
- setJar(): sets the job jar.
- setUser(): sets the reported username for this job.
- setCombinerClass(): sets the combiner class for the job.
- setReducerClass(): sets the Reducer for the job.
- setPartitionerClass(): sets the Partitioner for the job.
- setMapOutputKeyClass(): sets the key class for the map output data.
- setMapOutputValueClass(): sets the value class for the map output data.
- setOutputKeyClass(): sets the key class for the job output data.
- setOutputValueClass(): sets the value class for job outputs.
- setCombinerKeyGroupingComparatorClass(): defines the comparator that controls which keys are grouped together for a single call to combiner.
- setSortComparatorClass(): defines the comparator that controls how the keys are sorted before they are passed to the Reducer.
- setGroupingComparatorClass(): defines the comparator that controls which keys are grouped together for a single call to Reducer.reduce().
- setJobName(): sets the user-specified job name.
- setSpeculativeExecution(): turns speculative execution on or off for this job.
- setMapSpeculativeExecution(): turns spec

KEY FUNCTIONALITY:
- Add a file path to the current set of classpath entries.
- Add an archive path to the current set of classpath entries.
- Set the number of maximum attempts that will be made to run a map task.
- Set the number of maximum attempts that will be made to run a reduce task.
- Set whether the system should collect profiler information for some of the tasks in this job.
- Set the profiler configuration arguments.
- Set the ranges of maps or reduces to profile.

CORE LOGIC:
- Ensure that the configuration is consistent with the new APIs.
- Add a file to job config for shared cache processing.
- Add an archive to job config for shared cache processing.
- Set the shared cache upload policies for files.
- Set the shared cache upload policies for archives.

INPUTS/OUTPUTS:
- The inputs are the configuration and the file system.
- The outputs are the updated configuration and the job status.

DEPENDENCIES:
- The dependencies are the Cluster class and the JobSubmitter class.
